methods.method_name: Measurement of Allergen-sIgE Antibody Titers and tIgE in Blood Serum
methods.description: This method evaluates the roles of sIgE and tIgE levels in the diagnostic screening of pollinosis using serum samples collected from venous blood. It involves the use of a chemiluminescent enzyme immunoassay to measure sIgE titers against specific allergens and a sandwich enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay to measure tIgE values.

steps.description: Serum samples were collected from the venous blood samples of the subjects and preserved at −20°C until further use.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and store serum samples from venous blood at −20°C

steps.description: IMMULITE ® 2000 Systems 3g Allergy TM, a chemiluminescent enzyme immunoassay, was used for measuring the titers of sIgE against specific allergens.
steps.searchable_summary: use IMMULITE 2000 system to measure sIgE titers

steps.description: Allergen-sIgE titers were defined into classes based on IU A /mL values.
steps.searchable_summary: classify sIgE titers into predefined classes

steps.description: The tIgE value was measured using the sandwich enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay method for each sample.

methods.description: This method describes the recruitment and categorization of study participants based on their responses to a self-reported questionnaire about pollinosis symptoms. Participants were grouped into pollen allergy and pollen allergy-free groups.

steps.description: This study recruited employees from a private company who underwent health screening in September 2015.
steps.searchable_summary: recruit study participants from company health screening

steps.description: A self-reported questionnaire was used to evaluate the symptoms of pollinosis.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollinosis symptom data via questionnaire

steps.description: Respondents were categorized into pollen allergy group (group A) and pollen allergy-free group (group B) based on their answers.
steps.searchable_summary: categorize participants into allergy and non-allergy groups

steps.description: The study protocol was approved by the Institutional Review Board of Kyorin University.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain IRB approval for study protocol

steps.description: Written informed consent was obtained from the employees for their participation and use of data.
